## Checklist

- [ ] Backend builds: `cd packages/dotnet-api && dotnet build` (0 errors)
- [ ] Tests pass for affected areas
- [ ] Frontend typechecks: `cd packages/backoffice-web && npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Regenerated the API client if a controller changed: `npm run generate-swagger`
- [ ] Regenerated SignalR client if a hub contract changed: `npm run generate-signalr`
- [ ] No secrets committed; placeholders only in `appsettings.json` / `.env.example`
